goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should leave on 'friday'.
The train should 'leave after 13:30' and should go to 'london liverpool street'.
Make sure you get 'arrival time' and 'train ID'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'mutliple sports' and should be in the 'centre'.
If there is no such attraction, how about one that is in 'the type of theatre'.
Make sure you get 'entrance fee'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should depart from cambridge and should leave on friday
The train should leave after 13:30 and should go to london liverpool street
Make sure you get arrival time and train ID
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of mutliple sports and should be in the centre
If there is no such attraction, how about one that is in the type of theatre
Make sure you get entrance fee
